item.title: Beer for Breakfast on KDGE 102.1 The Edge Dallas/Fort Worth Radio
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America, we were invited to Beer for Breakfast on Dallas/Fort Worth radio KDGE 102.1 The Edge . Morning show host Vydra tries a new beer each week at 8:10am, but there was one beer no one could get her in the state of Texas, except us of course! They rank beers, […]

The post Beer for Breakfast on KDGE 102.1 The Edge Dallas/Fort Worth Radio first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head: Squall IPA, Ep. 160
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week Beer America TV tackles yet one more beer from Dogfish Head. Squall IPA is basically a 100% bottle conditioned version of their 90 Minute IPA thats dry hopped . Another excellent IPA which is by no means a surprise coming from Dogfish! The good news is, this beer should cellar well, the bad […]

The post Dogfish Head: Squall IPA, Ep. 160 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head: Theobroma, Ep. 153
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
It’s been a while since Beer America TV discussed a Dogfish Head beer, so thanks to our good friend at TexasBrews.org, Scooter Hendon, we’ve got one to share! Theobroma is part of the Dogfish Ancient Ale series brewed with Aztec cocoa powder, honey and chilies . One thing for sure is that it dosn’t taste […]

The post Dogfish Head: Theobroma, Ep. 153 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: “Beer America” Pilot/Idea, Part 2, 2004 – Ep. 118
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Part 2 of the Beer America TV “It was my idea first” episode is here! After shooting my Beer America screen test with Dogfish Head owner Sam Calagione in 2003, I found myself wanting to shoot something a little more in-depth to shop to networks like the Travel Channel. A&E, Discovery, Scripts etc . So […]

The post “Beer America” Pilot/Idea, Part 2, 2004 – Ep. 118 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head & Sierra Nevada: Life and Limb – Ep. 105
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week it’s yet another beer that defies style – Life and Limb. A collaboration beer between Dogfish Head and Sierra Nevada, Life and Limb is a big complex beer that tastes like nothing we’ve tried in the past. It also is brewed using local ingredients from both the Calagione family farm and Grossman family […]

The post Dogfish Head & Sierra Nevada: Life and Limb – Ep. 105 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head: Heaven and Hell – Beer America TV, Ep. 77
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
OK, so you can’t buy this one in a single bottle, but you can make it yourself using two of Dogfish Heads biggest beers, their 120 IPA and their World Wide Stout . It’s basically an extreme black and tan that punches your taste buds right where it counts. It’s two great tastes that taste […]

The post Dogfish Head: Heaven and Hell – Beer America TV, Ep. 77 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head: World Wide Stout – Ep. 75
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Like it says on the bottle, “A very dark beer brewed with a ridiculous amount of barley”, Dogfish Heads World Wide Stout is a HUGE beer and not for the timid. At 18% ABV it’s best enjoyed slowly and in a snifter . This beer also is a great companion with desert!

The post Dogfish Head: World Wide Stout – Ep. 75 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head 120 IPA, Ep. 60
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We’ve talked about plenty of beers from Dogfish Head, but do you realize this one is actually illegal in many states? With its extremely high ABV, Dogfish 120 IPA is as big as they come if you like hops! This beer is like no other in the category, and if you can ever get your […]

The post Dogfish Head 120 IPA, Ep. 60 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
